summary: Solid show with standout Foolish Heart and cool Saint > Eyes transition; recording quality not discussed
review: The performance is praised for a great Foolish Heart, the unexpected Saint > Eyes combo, and an octave‑pedal‑driven Wheel, earning the reviewer four bags of popcorn. No comments on the source or fidelity of the recording were provided, leaving its technical quality unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: One positive review highlights strong musical moments (high show rating) but gives no information on audio fidelity; overall rating reflects a good show with unknown recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Short first set with a few highlighted moments; the Saint > Eyes transition is noted as an unexpected highlight.
